title: taraxacum pubens
intro: Taraxacum pubens, also known as the common dandelion, is a perennial plant with jagged leaves and bright yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum pubens include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in tea, tincture, and supplement forms, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
